componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
This opportunity cannot be synchronized with the financial system because the customer (account) has not been filled in completely.


Check the following on the account:

- the payment methods

- the billing address

- the shipping address

- the contact person for exactly

- the bank details


The Salesforce process will function normally, afterwards the synchronization must be carried out manually to the financial system!
